---
title: "appendix"
author: "Krrish Jambhulkar"
format:
  html: default
  pdf: default
editor: visual
---

\
\
AI Declaration\
\
I used Chat GPT a generative AI tool to assist with this assignment. Specifically I used it to Correct grammar and spelling in my report writing\
\
Screenshots\
\

![](images/Screenshot1%20.png)

![](images/Screenshot2.png)

![](images/Screenshot3.png)

![](images/Screenshot4.png)

![](images/Screenshot5.png)

\
\
\
